name: NervGen Pharma Corp.
description: NervGen Pharma Corp. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative neuroreparative therapeutics for individuals suffering from spinal cord injuries and other neurological conditions. The company's lead candidate, NVG-291, aims to transform the treatment landscape by enabling the nervous system to repair itself. By focusing on pharmacologic approaches to address significant unmet medical needs, NervGen is working to improve the quality of life for patients living with traumatic and chronic neurological damage. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company is committed to advancing its pipeline through rigorous clinical research and development.
